name: Theodore Wind Farm
operational_notes: RWE Renewables Australia is CIS counterparty (SPV 'Theodore Energy Development' operating entity). Previously threatened by QLD LNP government. RE identifies Theodore as the 'gigawatt-scale project nearest to construction' among T7 winners. RWE press release cites 1.1 GW; pv-tech + AEMO cite 1,022 MW — likely DC/AC or export-limit distinction. Construction subject to EPBC approvals + FID.

timeline.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (1022 MW)
timeline.detail: Theodore Energy Development's Theodore Wind Farm (QLD) wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting. Part of the 19-project / 7.8 GW package announced 2026-05-23.

sources.title: New projects to deliver 7.8 GW of clean energy (DCCEEW)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: RWE Renewables Australia is CIS counterparty. Construction subject to EPBC approvals + FID. RE identifies as nearest-to-construction T7 gigawatt-scale project. 1.1 GW per RWE press release; 1,022 MW per pv-tech/AEMO — likely DC/AC or export-limit distinction.
